title: OpenAM jato.clientSession unrestricted Java deserialization (pre-auth RCE)
description: Encoder.deserialize wraps an attacker-controlled byte array in ApplicationObjectInputStream and calls readObject without a class whitelist. The jato.clientSession HTTP parameter on JATO ViewBean endpoints (e.g. Password Reset pages) is decoded through this routine, so an unauthenticated attacker can deliver a malicious Java serialized payload and achieve remote code execution. A previous fix (CVE-2021-35464) added a WhitelistObjectInputStream for jato.pageSession but did not patch this second deserialization entry point.
